title: 01-01 Bootstrap working slice
objective: Create the thinnest working slice for the phase goal.

tasks.name: Task 1: create the initial working slice
tasks.action: Implement the smallest runnable slice that satisfies the requirement.
tasks.verify: Run the smallest focused check for the slice.
tasks.done: The slice works and is observable.

tasks.name: Task 2: document the slice
tasks.action: Document what was added and how to run it.
tasks.verify: Read the README section and confirm it matches reality.
tasks.done: The setup and outcome are documented.
